author: Alex-F90
title: No
content: I can’t open any file from the phone’s storage, it shows an ‘error’ message. Uninstall.

author: duroursu
title: Best Player for Iphone
content: This is the best player for offline files,it actualy works with flacs,mp3 etc, if it would have waveform would be even better,soo THX

author: GeoLix
title: SOUNDYYYYYYY
content:

it was the coolest, I could change everything.
it was my favorite!
bring the application back to the app store !!!!!!!!!

author: Bvandrei
title: Foarte util
content: Folosesc softul cu un numar foarte mare de file format flac si face fata.

author: silviu1986
title: After the last update...
content: Good app, but after the last update it doesn’t play the next song. Sometimes it stops at first song, sometimes at second. I’m using an iphone X.

author: user_0052
title: Flacbox
content: They update with adds, they drive you crazy !!

author: SentientNo4
title: Useless
content: Does not connect to local server, either over Samba or DLNA. Just shows a neverending spinner icon.

author: stefanskyman
title: Worst flac player I ever seen
content:
I installed it for the purpose of using it for flac streaming files from a cloud drive via WebDav protocol .
It’s not working and also disconnecting my phone from the drive !
I wrote an email to the developer but no received no answer .

After a long research I found out Weaver App which is flawless , I do recomend this app .

author: vladtm
title: Excellent
content: Great app to stream network shares and also cloud shares. Love it !

author: Iu5ti
title: Best Music Player so far...
content:
* Can copy music from lan, cloud etc into app. (you can also do it the old way, www-server or itunes)
* Can output to USB audio in 24 bit.
* Can make playlists and handle music stored in-app or cloud/lan or both - play from anywhere.

* Can also play mp3, aac, etc

The in-app is just to support the dev, and removes the small add in the app. Nothing is missing, app is great.

author: Nou gasit
title: Foarte buna aplicația
content: Merge perfect. Recunoaște probabil cele mai multe clouduri.
